name: A weird encounter 🌸
description:
Your battered scanner failed to warn you about the rogue meteor storm, leaving your ship pummeled and systems fried. A desperate teleport jump malfunctioned, stranding you on an uncharted, desolate planet deep in the Epsilon Expanse.

With the comm system dead and the ship grounded, you're left to explore. The planet, at least, is beautiful—colossal alien flowers bloom in vibrant, mesmerizing hues, their faintly glowing petals casting soft light. But as you walk among them, unease takes hold. You could swear the flowers turn toward you, their subtle movements almost... deliberate.

Request from: Anonymous
